title: Agent Bricks Supervisor Agent now supports custom MCP servers and custom agents on Databricks Apps
body: You can now add custom MCP servers and custom agents hosted in Databricks Apps as subagents in your Supervisor Agent. See [Use Supervisor Agent to create a coordinated multi-agent system](/aws/en/agents/agent-bricks/multi-agent-supervisor).

ref_links.text: Use Supervisor Agent to create a coordinated multi-agent system
